name: Is there a way to apply a sinewave distortion effect purely in shaders?
snippet: Yes, this can be done using shaders. Using a vertex shader you can apply a sine distortion on a grid. A fragment shader can modulate the texture coordinate. name: Animated Wave Distortion Shader
snippet: Wave Distortion Shader. This unshaded spatial shader creates animated sinusoidal wave patterns that distort the mesh surface along its normals.
